title: Invalid date format error in DateTime node
symptom: The workflow fails with 'Invalid date format' when trying to extract the year from a date after formatting it.
not_this_if: Date is in a different format
Error occurs before the DateTime node
root_cause: The DateTime node in n8n requires dates to be parsed correctly after being formatted. When dates are converted back to strings, they need to be re-parsed to extract specific parts like the year.
fix_steps: Use the DateTime node to format the date correctly.
Use the expression 'DateTime.fromFormat(fieldName, 'yyyy').year' to extract the year.
agent_instruction: Reformat the date and use the correct expression to extract the year.
